LOD residuals after the removal of tidal friction, glacial isostatic adjustment, and climatic effects.
Time range 720 BC to 2020 AD.
Data are with respect to 2020.
First column: time in year (negative years mean BC)
Second column: LOD residuals in milliseconds
Third column: uncertainty of the LOD residuals in milliseconds

If you use the data, please cite the following references:
1. The increasingly dominant role of climate change on length of day variations: Kiani Shahvandi et al. 2024 published in PNAS, https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.2406930121
2. Length of day variations explained in a Bayesian framework: Kiani Shahvandi et al. 2024 published in GRL
3. Addendum 2020 to ‘Measurement of the Earth’s rotation: 720 BC to AD 2015’: Morrison et al. 2021 published in Proceedings of the Royal Society A, https://doi.org/10.1098/rspa.2020.0776
